privileged_info_summary: The task requires using JASP's Prophet module to forecast 12 periods on the 'Airline Passengers' dataset. The dataset is downloaded from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jbrownlee/Datasets/master/airline-passengers.csv', and contains a 'Month' variable (Time variable) and a 'Passengers' variable (Dependent variable). The agent must save its forecast to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/PassengerForecast.jasp'. The data is real-world non-synthetic data.
